title: eurycoma longifolia subsp. eglandulosa
intro: Eurycoma longifolia subsp. eglandulosa is a subspecies of the Eurycoma longifolia plant, also known as Tongkat Ali, which is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties, helping to boost energy levels and improve overall health. The health benefits of Eurycoma longifolia subsp. eglandulosa include improved physical performance, enhanced mental clarity, and increased immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Eurycoma longifolia subsp. eglandulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, extracts, and teas, and is also available in supplement form.
